diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/ERM/ERMAdditionalCurrency.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/ERM/ERMAdditionalCurrency.Codeunit.al
index ee712bb9..491e1928 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/ERM/ERMAdditionalCurrency.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/ERM/ERMAdditionalCurrency.Codeunit.al
@@ -1025,6 +1025,40 @@ codeunit 134043 "ERM Additional Currency"
         VerifyCurrAdjGLEntryDescription(GLEntry, VATPostingSetup[2]."Purchase VAT Account", VATAmount[2]);
     end;
 
+    [Test]
+    [Scope('OnPrem')]
+    procedure AdjustExchRateWithNoVATEntriesDoesNotDivideByZero()
+    var
+        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
+        Currency: Record Currency;
+        VATEntry: Record "VAT Entry";
+        StartingDate: Date;
+    begin
+        // [SCENARIO] Adjust Exchange Rate does not fail with divide by zero when no VAT Entries exist
+        // [FEATURE] [VAT] [Currency Adjustment]
+        Initialize();
+
+        // [GIVEN] Currency with exchange rates
+        CreateCurrencyWithExchangeRates(Currency, 2, StartingDate);
+
+        // [GIVEN] General Ledger Setup "Additional Reporting Currency" = Currency
+        LibraryERM.SetAddReportingCurrency(Currency.Code);
+
+        // [GIVEN] General Ledger Setup "VAT Exchange Rate Adjustment" := Adjust Additional-Currency Amount
+        UpdateGenLedgerVATExchRateAdjustment(
+          GeneralLedgerSetup."VAT Exchange Rate Adjustment"::"Adjust Additional-Currency Amount");
+
+        // [GIVEN] No VAT Entries exist
+        VATEntry.DeleteAll();
+
+        // [WHEN] Run Adjust Exchange Rates with Adjust G/L Accounts enabled
+        LibraryERM.RunExchRateAdjustment(
+          Currency.Code, StartingDate, StartingDate + 1, 'Test', StartingDate + 1, LibraryUtility.GenerateGUID(), true);
+
+        // [THEN] No error occurs (process completes successfully)
+        // Before fix: "Attempted to divide by zero" error occurred in AdjustVAT when VATEntry.Count = 0
+    end;
+
     [Test]
     [Scope('OnPrem')]
     procedure PostTwoGenJournalWithZeroAmountsAndNonZeroAdditionalCurrency()
